findings.title: Hardcoded RSA private key
findings.recommendation: Remove hardcoded secret and rotate affected credentials.

findings.title: Service publishes ports (review exposure)
findings.description: Published ports can expose services publicly depending on host firewall/networking.
findings.recommendation: Bind only necessary ports, restrict to localhost where possible, and use a reverse proxy/LB with auth.

findings.title: Potential plaintext secrets in docker-compose environment
findings.description: Secret-like environment variables appear to be set to literal values in compose.
findings.recommendation: Use env var injection from a secret manager, Docker/Swarm secrets, or external config files with strict access.
